result.stdout:
maverick-pack v1.0.8
  Maverick package build tool

USAGE
  maverick-pack [options]
  maverick-pack [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  build             Build package 
  publish           Publish package 

You can run `maverick-pack [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
maverick-pack v1.0.8
  Maverick package build tool

USAGE
  maverick-pack build <input> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Build package

PARAMETERS
  input             path to input .json file 

OPTIONS
  -o|--Output       Package output folder. Default: "./Builds".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
maverick-pack v1.0.8
  Maverick package build tool

USAGE
  maverick-pack publish <input> --ApiKey <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  Publish package

PARAMETERS
  input             path to input .json file 

OPTIONS
* -k|--ApiKey       ApiKey value 
  -o|--Output       Package output folder. Default: "./Builds".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
